blockedAssertions.detail: The embed capability code works correctly (build-request produces valid JSON and invoke command structure is correct), but cannot authenticate with the NVIDIA API without an API key. This is an environment limitation, not a code defect. The assertion specifically requires live API access which is not available in this environment.

notes: Round 4 confirms same blocking issue as rounds 1-3: NVIDIA_API_KEY not available in environment
VAL-EMBED-001 (embed capability in catalog) remains passed
VAL-EMBED-002 (build-request works) remains passed - confirmed again: `python3 scripts/nim_router.py build-request --capability embed --text 'hello world'` returns valid JSON
VAL-EMBED-003 (embed endpoint accessible) remains blocked - cannot authenticate without API key
The embed capability implementation is correct. VAL-EMBED-003 requires external NVIDIA API access which is blocked by missing credential.
